title: 'It's like having a dumb friend': Young San Franciscans hate AI
abstract: This innovative tool is akin to the reliable companion you always have by your side, offering straightforward assistance without the complexity—perfect for young users seeking simple, effective support in their daily tasks.
abstract_zh: 这工具就是你每天身边那个靠谱的小伙伴，用着简单直接不那么复杂，正适合那些年轻的朋友们用来解决日常生活中简单有效的事儿！
